programme.desc: In 1996, engineering student Mike Lazaridis and best friend Douglas Fregin stand on the precipice of creating the world's first smartphone. However, a series of disastrous events paves the way for the gadget's eventual demise. Comedy, starring Jay Baruchel, Glenn Howerton and Matt Johnson

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The penultimate edition sees four of the contestants in with a realistic chance of becoming the 21st Taskmaster champion - while Joel Dommett is just having a really good time. Alex Horne is delighted to be put in charge of a flip-flop flinging machine, Amy Gledhill wrings out a poached egg, Kumail Nanjiani tries planking and Armando Iannucci shows why it's important not to curtail his nap time

programme.title: The Lighthouse (2019)
programme.desc: In the late 19th century, Ephraim Winslow is hired to work for a month on an isolated island off the coast of New England, under the supervision of an irritable old man named Thomas Wake. Winslow tries to stay sane as Wake assigns him a series of arduous tasks, but that seems to be the toughest job of all. Co-writer/director Robert Eggers' psychological thriller, starring Robert Pattinson and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the King's Head in Addlethorpe, Lincolnshire, where landlady Helen Coy and her bar manager and best friend Emma Green are pulling out all the stops to win. The B&B owners are taken back to their childhood at the funfair, At dinner, B&B beginners Louise and Andy Macbeth rattle nerves when Louise reveals her past career as a hospitality journalist - leaving pub veteran Helen less than impressed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: B&B newcomers Andy and Louise Macbeth invite their rival hoteliers to spend the night at the dog-friendly Beck Hall in North Yorkshire, where an extra-critical Helen and Emma discover what they believe to be stray dog hairs in their bed. A fishing trip makes Terri feel a little out of sorts, and when the time arrives for feedback, the managers are surprised to learn two of their guests have indicated they would not come back for a second stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Albaston in Torquay for the third day of the competition, where they are welcomed by owners and avid souvenir collectors, Kevin and Julie Shadbolt. Terri and Stuart are impressed by their room, but are startled by the memorabilia in the communal lounge, and expectations are raised at dinner when Kevin reveals he has a secret recipe for success when it comes to breakfast. However, at feedback the next day, tensions begin to rise

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay of the week is in Bournemouth, at Terri and Stewart's specialist dance holiday venue the Hotel Piccadilly, where a class in the grand ballroom soon has the guests in a spin. However, temperatures rise over dinner when the simmering tension between Louise and Helen finally boils over

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet up for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. King's Head landlady Helen challenges Louise and Andy about the problems they reported on cleanliness in the bathroom. while Louise and Andy from Beck Hall get hot under the collar when the others criticise their dog-friendly approach

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: A new employee entertains everyone with his impersonations - usurping Doug's role as the office clown. American comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug fakes a heart attack to stop Carrie getting angry after he forgets her friend's name. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug tries to find his father at a model-train convention - but instead finds his mother with a highly flirtatious Arthur. American comedy, starring Kevin James and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie decide to find new friends in an attempt to annoy Deacon and his wife, but find it is harder than it looks

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is elated to be signed up by a modelling agency, convinced fame and wealth are just around the corner - but his dreams of success prove short-lived. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A stranger reveals to the Barones that Frank used to be his mentor - much to the bemusement of Ray and Robert, who find it hard to believe their father could ever have inspired anyone. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert and Ray end up with the mother of all guilt trips when they decide not to help Marie with a home project so they can land a prime spot on the golf course

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz helps Frasier arrange a date between her mother and Martin, unaware they detest each other. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Show Where Woody Shows Up
programme.desc: Woody pays Frasier a surprise visit and the friends become nostalgic about old times in a certain Boston bar. With a guest appearance by Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: An episode consisting of three Valentine's Day stories. Frasier takes his station manager to dinner, but cannot work out whether she has a personal or professional interest in him. Niles' plans for a romantic evening are dashed, while Martin and Daphne commiserate with each other in their loneliness. Guest starring Virginia Madsen (Sideways)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles hires a new lawyer to represent him in his divorce case when Maris tries to postpone the settlement. However, the attorney warns him that his unrequited passion for Daphne could harm his chances in court - and so could Frasier's inability to lie

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty learns he has a long-lost daughter, but ruins any chances of a happy family life by gambling away her most prized possession in a high-stakes poker game. Featuring the guest voices of Drew Barrymore, John Updike, Amy Tam and Stephen King

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa joins an environmental protection group and begins campaigning in a last-ditch attempt to prevent the city's oldest redwood tree being felled by a rich Texan. With the voice of Joshua Jackson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer stages a revolt against moves to give Springfield a new telephone dialling code, stirring up public indignation and splitting the town down the middle. Featuring the guest voices of the Who and Gary Coleman

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week kicks off at 38 St Giles in Norwich, where guests enjoy a historic afternoon at the city's cathedral, and breakfast is a roaring success for everyone but one

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Harry and Sarah hope to wow their guests with their recently renovated pub The Royal Oak in Hawkhurst, Kent. Unfortunately, the style doesn't match one B&Ber's standards. After an afternoon on the beers at a microbrewery, moods are high but some pernickety furniture feedback brings Harry and Sarah back down to earth with a bump

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers head to Tiddington in Oxfordshire for the week's third visit, where Dawn hosts at her country pub, The Fox & Goat. The facilities seem to be flawless, leaving one guest determined to find some faulty furniture. There's another historic afternoon out, this time with a tour around Blenheim Palace. All that walking should have the B&Bers knackered and ready for bed - so why does one of them have such a restless night?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to No 64 at The Joiners in West Malling, Kent. Host Ollie hopes that his French-styled B&B will have that 'je-ne-sais-quoi' to win the competition. The guests monkey around at a zoo in the afternoon before things get heated in the kitchen the next morning. The heat rises even further when Ollie sees his breakfast scores

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's payment day, and after an epic battle all week, the contenders meet up one final time to find out which boutique B&B has triumphed

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Northern Ireland where Jennifer has hit a wall climbing the property ladder after selling her semi-detached starter home in Belfast and Tony and Val are looking to relocate from London to County Down

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The 1966 World Cup Final - In Colour
programme.desc: England v West Germany. To raise awareness about Alzheimer's disease, David Baddiel introduces a full-colour restoration of the iconic showpiece match at Wembley Stadium. Alf Ramsey's hosts were looking to lift the trophy for the first time, but faced a tough test against the West Germans, and the match would go to extra time, with six goals being scored. With contributions from Geoff Hurst, Harry Kane, Michael Owen and Jill Scott

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones is joined by David Coulthard, Mark Webber and Lawrence Barretto to present action from the battle for grid positions in the sixth round of the campaign, held at Circuit de Monaco. McLaren's Lando Norris took pole position here last year, with Charles Leclerc of Ferrari joining him at the front of the grid

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody (2018)
programme.desc: Freddie Mercury and Queen go from playing small venues to becoming one of the biggest rock bands in the world. While Freddie comes to terms with his sexuality, outside forces threaten to tear the group apart, until their defining moment at Live Aid in July 1985. Oscar-winning biopic, starring Rami Malek, Lucy Boynton and Gwilym Lee

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics gather in front of their TVs once more to give their thoughts on the week's programming. Shows subjected to their scrutiny include The Great British Bake Off, Coronation Street, Educating Yorkshire, The Inheritance, Stranded on Honeymoon Island, The Guest, The Dog House and BBC News coverage of Donald Trump's tariffs

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: A pair of teenage schoolgirls ask Sam and his crew to make a movie about their favourite teacher, Miss Stanthorpe, who never got a chance to go to her own prom. The headmaster backs the project in a bid to look cool, hapless Sebastian spills food on his top - reverting to his childlike self and rejoining Year 8 - and the girls compete over who should play the young Miss Stanthorpe. Comedy from the mind of Sam Campbell, who stars alongside Lara Ricote, Aaron Chen and David Hargreaves

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Gurnsfield United are a bottom league team without a chance, but number one fan Ewin wants to see them win, if only on the big screen. Sam and the gang can't resist making such an innocent dream come true - only to find themselves being sued by an eccentric British writer for inadvertently stealing one of his characters

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty learns he has a long-lost daughter, but ruins any chances of a happy family life by gambling away her most prized possession in a high-stakes poker game. Featuring the guest voices of Drew Barrymore, John Updike, Amy Tam and Stephen King

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa joins an environmental protection group and begins campaigning in a last-ditch attempt to prevent the city's oldest redwood tree being felled by a rich Texan. With the voice of Joshua Jackson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer stages a revolt against moves to give Springfield a new telephone dialling code, stirring up public indignation and splitting the town down the middle. Featuring the guest voices of the Who and Gary Coleman

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: The family turn their attention to Sarah's dad's old caravan, tucked away in the corner of the barn. Sarah plans to transform the caravan into a beautiful living and sleeping space for when the family band is on tour. With only a few weeks until their first festival gig, the whole family pitch in to clean, gut and paint it, and then lay the new floor - a lino print inspired by a Persian rug

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Dumfries to meet Maggie, whose farm holds an extraordinary collection of memorabilia

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is prompted to retaliate when Doug falls in love with a designer aftershave that she cannot stand. Meanwhile, Arthur attempts to teach Spence and Holly the art of movie-hopping. American comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie uses her extra income to hire a maid, making Doug feel so jealous that he decides to employ his own domestic help - in the form of Spence's mother Veronica. Unfortunately, she proves more of a liability than an asset around the house. American comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug decides to pursue his dream of becoming a bartender, but Carrie is unimpressed with his plans. Meanwhile, Arthur also attempts a career change, entering the dangerous world of politics. American comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank and Marie announce their plans to move into a retirement home in New Jersey - much to the relief of their family. While Robert is overjoyed to be getting his hands on his parents' house at last, Debra is surprised to find she has misgivings about losing touch with her in-laws

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray visit Frank and Marie, only to learn they are facing eviction from their new home - so Robert is forced to let them move back in with him. American comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray realises that the angrier Debra gets, the better their sex life becomes - so he decides to stir up conflict between her and Marie. American comedy, starring Patricia Heaton, Doris Roberts and Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles plans a holiday at his newly acquired cabin to get over the shock of Daphne's blossoming romance with Donny, and later joins forces with a lovelorn Roz to end the couple's relationship. Comedy, with David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Crane brothers plan a dinner party, but agonise over who to invite, and devise an unusual game to determine the final guest list. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to reclaim his luxury apartment but finds obstacles in his path, including a tap-dancing grief counsellor and wary neighbours. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by Matt Morsia, Adrian Lester, Samantha Barks, Sam C Wilson and Fearne Cotton. With music from Talia Mar

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer starts his own web page and begins revealing the intimate secrets of everyone in Springfield - but ends up making powerful enemies who imprison him on an island. Featuring the voice of Patrick McGoohan

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge helps a former convict fulfil his artistic ambitions by painting a mural at the school, but he soon clashes with Principal Skinner over the design. With the guest voice of Michael Keaton

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer uncovers a plan to move his beloved Springfield Isotopes baseball team to New Mexico, so he takes desperate measures to keep them in town and goes on hunger strike in protest. With the guest voice of Stacy Keach

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: In one of the most ambitious and eccentric builds ever, a man attempts to build a miniature canal and lock to house a narrow boat - and then turns the boat itself into something never before seen on the series. George also visits a house full of colour in London and an all-black, one-bedroom hotel housed in an old industrial crane in Denmark, while Will Hardie checks out a wooden home in a horsebox. Together, the pair put the final touch to their 18th-century-inspired cabin in the sky.

programme.title: The Beautiful Game (2024)
programme.desc: Veteran football scout Mal persuades a talented but troubled former striker to play for England in the 20th edition of the Homeless World Cup in Rome. To win and overcome the South African favourites in their group, the England players will have to find common ground off the pitch. Sporting comedy drama, starring Bill Nighy, Micheal Ward and Susan Wokoma

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones is joined by David Coulthard, Mark Webber and Lawrence Barretto to present action from the sixth round of the campaign, held at Circuit de Monaco. Lando Norris of McLaren was the victorious driver last year, with Ferrari's Charles Leclerc second and Norris' teammate Oscar Piastri finishing third

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: When Clive meets Diane at work, the chance of a romance leads him to confess secrets that he's kept quiet for years. But when Clive and Leo discover the truth about Calico Road, they're thrown into open warfare. Marie, Saul and George have no choice but to join the battle, as the two households conspire against each other. But Clive's fury won't be stopped, and the danger to Leo gets closer

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, including the likes of Vernon Kay and Paddy McGuinness, Denise Van Outen and Johnny Vaughan, Vicky Pattison and Pete Wicks, Bez and Shaun Ryder, Ashley Banjo and Perri Kiely, Rylan and mum Linda, and Roman and Martin Kemp sit down to give their sharp, insightful and funny thoughts on the week's TV

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A hairdresser and a builder show that age is just a number. A hip-hop artist meets a musician looking for love off stage. Two 19-year-olds take their first dating steps together and a weightlifter and a bodybuilder weigh up their options

programme.title: Nomadland (2020)
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman is left out of work following the economic collapse of her entire home town. She begins a life outside of conventional society, becoming a modern-day nomad and finding a community of like-minded people adopting a life on the road. Drama, starring Frances McDormand and David Strathairn

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.desc: Homer stages a revolt against moves to give Springfield a new telephone dialling code, stirring up public indignation and splitting the town down the middle. Featuring the guest voices of the Who and Gary Coleman

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: The family turn their attention to Sarah's dad's old caravan, tucked away in the corner of the barn. Sarah plans to transform the caravan into a beautiful living and sleeping space for when the family band is on tour. With only a few weeks until their first festival gig, the whole family pitch in to clean, gut and paint it, and then lay the new floor - a lino print inspired by a Persian rug

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Dumfries to meet Maggie, whose farm holds an extraordinary collection of memorabilia

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is prompted to retaliate when Doug falls in love with a designer aftershave that she cannot stand. Meanwhile, Arthur attempts to teach Spence and Holly the art of movie-hopping. American comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie uses her extra income to hire a maid, making Doug feel so jealous that he decides to employ his own domestic help - in the form of Spence's mother Veronica. Unfortunately, she proves more of a liability than an asset around the house. American comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug decides to pursue his dream of becoming a bartender, but Carrie is unimpressed with his plans. Meanwhile, Arthur also attempts a career change, entering the dangerous world of politics. American comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank and Marie announce their plans to move into a retirement home in New Jersey - much to the relief of their family. While Robert is overjoyed to be getting his hands on his parents' house at last, Debra is surprised to find she has misgivings about losing touch with her in-laws

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray visit Frank and Marie, only to learn they are facing eviction from their new home - so Robert is forced to let them move back in with him. American comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray realises that the angrier Debra gets, the better their sex life becomes - so he decides to stir up conflict between her and Marie. American comedy, starring Patricia Heaton, Doris Roberts and Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles plans a holiday at his newly acquired cabin to get over the shock of Daphne's blossoming romance with Donny, and later joins forces with a lovelorn Roz to end the couple's relationship. Comedy, with David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Crane brothers plan a dinner party, but agonise over who to invite, and devise an unusual game to determine the final guest list. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to reclaim his luxury apartment but finds obstacles in his path, including a tap-dancing grief counsellor and wary neighbours. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by Matt Morsia, Adrian Lester, Samantha Barks, Sam C Wilson and Fearne Cotton. With music from Talia Mar

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer starts his own web page and begins revealing the intimate secrets of everyone in Springfield - but ends up making powerful enemies who imprison him on an island. Featuring the voice of Patrick McGoohan

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge helps a former convict fulfil his artistic ambitions by painting a mural at the school, but he soon clashes with Principal Skinner over the design. With the guest voice of Michael Keaton

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer uncovers a plan to move his beloved Springfield Isotopes baseball team to New Mexico, so he takes desperate measures to keep them in town and goes on hunger strike in protest. With the guest voice of Stacy Keach

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: In one of the most ambitious and eccentric builds ever, a man attempts to build a miniature canal and lock to house a narrow boat - and then turns the boat itself into something never before seen on the series. George also visits a house full of colour in London and an all-black, one-bedroom hotel housed in an old industrial crane in Denmark, while Will Hardie checks out a wooden home in a horsebox. Together, the pair put the final touch to their 18th-century-inspired cabin in the sky.

programme.title: The Beautiful Game (2024)
programme.desc: Veteran football scout Mal persuades a talented but troubled former striker to play for England in the 20th edition of the Homeless World Cup in Rome. To win and overcome the South African favourites in their group, the England players will have to find common ground off the pitch. Sporting comedy drama, starring Bill Nighy, Micheal Ward and Susan Wokoma

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones is joined by David Coulthard, Mark Webber and Lawrence Barretto to present action from the sixth round of the campaign, held at Circuit de Monaco. Lando Norris of McLaren was the victorious driver last year, with Ferrari's Charles Leclerc second and Norris' teammate Oscar Piastri finishing third

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: When Clive meets Diane at work, the chance of a romance leads him to confess secrets that he's kept quiet for years. But when Clive and Leo discover the truth about Calico Road, they're thrown into open warfare. Marie, Saul and George have no choice but to join the battle, as the two households conspire against each other. But Clive's fury won't be stopped, and the danger to Leo gets closer

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, including the likes of Vernon Kay and Paddy McGuinness, Denise Van Outen and Johnny Vaughan, Vicky Pattison and Pete Wicks, Bez and Shaun Ryder, Ashley Banjo and Perri Kiely, Rylan and mum Linda, and Roman and Martin Kemp sit down to give their sharp, insightful and funny thoughts on the week's TV

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics gather in front of their TVs once more to give their thoughts on the week's programming. Shows subjected to their scrutiny include The Great British Bake Off, Coronation Street, Educating Yorkshire, The Inheritance, Stranded on Honeymoon Island, The Guest, The Dog House and BBC News coverage of Donald Trump's tariffs

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Gypsy is told that Ryan will be listed as her baby's legal father until a court-ordered paternity test is completed. Social media gossiping doesn't help the situation

programme.title: Nomadland (2020)
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman is left out of work following the economic collapse of her entire home town. She begins a life outside of conventional society, becoming a modern-day nomad and finding a community of like-minded people adopting a life on the road. Drama, starring Frances McDormand and David Strathairn

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Greek at the Harbour restaurant in southern California, where owner Makis Mikelatos works 17 hours a day, seven days a week, but is unwilling to let his son Ari take the reins. Gordon sets out to get to the bottom of Makis's reluctance to teach his son, and uncovers a shocking family secret

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: The boys decide to try their hand at wildlife photography. Charlie and Rafferty build their very own deer hide, while Sarah heads to Dumfries House in western Scotland to attend a tea dance in her role as an ambassador for the King's Foundation. The visit inspires Sarah and Graham to use their new barn to host their own spectacular tea party for a local charity's 75th anniversary

programme.desc: A bizarre Scenes from a Hat sets up a plastic surgery hoedown and songs from Aisha: The Musical, while Jeff Davis chooses from a munchkin bully, a blind gondolier and Chicken Man

programme.sub-title: The One with the Fake Party
programme.desc: Rachel spoils Ross's plans of a romantic last evening with Emily before she returns to England by organising a farewell party and inviting everyone. Meanwhile Phoebe's pregnancy causes her to abandon her vegetarian lifestyle as she craves meat. Comedy, guest starring Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Free Porn
programme.desc: Ross pours out his heart to Emily, but is unprepared for her reaction, while Phoebe receives surprising news about her pregnancy. Chandler and Joey get free adult films on their TV and try to make sure they do not disappear

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachel's New Dress
programme.desc: Rachel's date is ruined when Joshua's parents return home earlier than expected and catch her parading round in a skimpy nightie - which she then has to pretend is a new dress. Starring Jennifer Aniston and Tate Donovan

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Haste
programme.desc: Monica and Rachel plot to take back their old apartment from Chandler and Joey, and there are major changes afoot for lovebirds Ross and Emily. Comedy, starring Courteney Cox and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Wedding Dresses
programme.desc: Chandler reaches the end of his tether over Joey's snoring and forces him to seek professional help, while Rachel has a drastic reaction to Ross's engagement. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross reminisces with Rachel about the good times they had when they were dating, as the invitations go out for his wedding. Meanwhile, the others work out whether they can attend the ceremony. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie (2016)
programme.desc: When a peaceful island is visited by mysterious green piggies, its up to Red, Bomb and Chuck, outcast flightless birds, to get to the bottom of the suspicious invaders. Animation, with the voices of Jason Sudeikis, Josh Gad, Danny McBride, Maya Rudolph and Bill Hader

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The duo's road trip continues as they arrive in Costa Rica, where Brad's fear of heights is tested as Barney arranges a flight in a tiny, roofless helicopter to take in some of Costa Rica's breathtaking coastal views. Later, the pair meet a quirky animal lover, before heading to the capital city of San Jose, where they join a local Roller Derby team for a match against their biggest rivals

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The duo continue to explore Costa Rica. Inspired by childhood memories, the pair head to the country's cloud forest, where they attempt tree climbing. They also visit a local sanctuary that is home to 2000 free roaming dogs, before heading into the countryside to meet a former Olympian in Kayak Slalom, where the father and son go head-to-head in a time trial

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Worst Best Man Ever
programme.desc: Joey somehow manages to lose Ross's wedding ring at the stag party, while Phoebe's pregnancy causes her to experience violent mood swings. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Ross's Wedding - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Rachel and a heavily pregnant Phoebe stay at home while Chandler, Joey and Monica go to England for Ross's wedding to Emily. Once there, however, it seems all Joey and Chandler can do is bicker. Guest starring Richard Branson and Sarah Ferguson

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Ross's Wedding - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. As everyone makes their final preparations for Ross's wedding in London, Rachel tries to get a flight out to declare her love for him before he marries Emily. Guest starring Jennifer Saunders, Elliott Gould, Hugh Laurie and Tom Conti

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Ross Says Rachel
programme.desc: Despite Ross's massive blunder, he and Emily go through with the wedding - but she is clearly devastated and sneaks out of a window at the reception, declaring she never wants to see him again. Guest starring Helen Baxendale, Elliott Gould and Jennifer Saunders

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Kissing
programme.desc: Rachel returns from Greece and Chandler proves popular with the womenfolk. Phoebe feels upset about missing out on all the excitement in London, so the gang decides to treat her to a weekend in Atlantic City. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Surrogate mum Phoebe goes into labour and gives birth to triplets, but it proves harder than she anticipated to hand them over to her brother. Meanwhile, Joey experiences some pain of his own and Monica plans to spite Chandler by dating a male nurse

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Phoebe Hates PBS
programme.desc: Emily makes a request that could change Ross's life for ever, presenting him with a huge dilemma. Chandler upsets Monica by gloating about sex, while Joey challenges Phoebe to perform a completely selfless act. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross delivers devastating news to Rachel - he cannot spend time with her while Emily is in New York. Meanwhile, Joey discovers Chandler's secret romance. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Emily asks Ross to move away from his friends, while Monica and Rachel are understandably taken aback to meet a hairy man who they mistake for a yeti. American comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Moves In
programme.desc: Ross moves in with Chandler and Joey, but the transition does not go as smoothly as expected. Danny deals Rachel's ego a blow by introducing her to an exceptionally dull date, and Phoebe becomes disillusioned with the health inspector she is seeing

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Thanksgivings
programme.desc: The pals digest a huge Thanksgiving meal and reminisce about their worst holiday experiences, including the time Chandler's father left his mother in favour of the houseboy, and the occasion in 1987 when a teenage Monica overheard Chandler calling her fat. Guest starring Morgan Fairchild

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey tries to cover up Chandler and Monica's relationship - but only succeeds in making himself look stupid. Phoebe persuades Rachel to take a literature class with her, while Ross falls out with his co-workers, convinced one of them stole his prized sandwich

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's The Wheel
programme.desc: The comedian hosts the Saturday-night game show, as contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize. Celebrities experts offering advice are Ed Balls on Prime Ministers, Oti Mabuse on South Africa, Jamie Laing on weddings, Gok Wan on fashion, Will Mellor on Only Fools and Horses, Kate Williams on Shakespeare and Fred Sirieix on reggae

programme.desc: The energetic stand-up star rails against the annoyances of modern life, in a performance recorded at the National Indoor Arena in Birmingham in 2014. Lee's routine sees him tackling the selfie phenomenon, the problems associated with getting older, and the numerous ways he tries to keep his long-suffering wife happy

programme.title: White Men Can't Jump (1992)
programme.desc: A basketball hustler working Los Angeles' courts uses his goofy appearance to lull his opponents into a false sense of security. Ron Shelton's comedy, starring Woody Harrelson, Wesley Snipes and Rosie Perez

programme.sub-title: The One with Chandler's Work Laugh
programme.desc: Monica is annoyed by the fake laugh Chandler uses at work whenever his boss cracks a joke and the gang gets a shock when Ross introduces his new girlfriend

programme.desc: Phoebe meets her biological father for the first time and Rachel helps Joey look a little more sophisticated with the addition of a trendy shoulder bag - which everyone else mistakes for a women's handbag

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Everybody Finds Out
programme.desc: Chandler and Monica's relationship finally becomes public knowledge to all but Ross, who is starting to get his life back on track by renting a flat opposite the girls. Comedy, starring Courteney Cox and Matthew Perry

programme.sub-title: The One with the Girl Who Hits Joey

programme.sub-title: The One with Rachel's Inadvertent Kiss

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel starts taking regular cigarette breaks to ingratiate herself with new boss Kim and colleague Nancy, even though she does not smoke, while Joey competes with Ross's son for a role in a TV commercial. Comedy, guest starring Joanna Gleason (Boogie Nights)

programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Can't Flirt
programme.desc: Joey tells everyone about his upcoming TV appearance, little anticipating the surprise awaiting him, and Ross flirts with a pizza-delivery woman, but leaves her decidedly unimpressed

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The guys enjoy a ride in a police car, until the sound of a gunshot causes them to fear for their lives. Meanwhile, Rachel accidentally listens to a telephone message to Ross from Emily. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns Gary plans to ask her to move in with him, but fears it is too early in their relationship for such a commitment, and asks Chandler to help her change his mind. programme.sub-title: The One with the Inappropriate Sister

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Resolutions
programme.desc: The pals announce resolutions for the coming year and Chandler enlists Joey's help so he can kiss Monica at midnight during a New Year's Eve party. American comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Courtney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Chandler's Work Laugh
programme.desc: Monica is annoyed by the fake laugh Chandler uses at work whenever his boss cracks a joke and the gang gets a shock when Ross introduces his new girlfriend

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe meets her biological father for the first time and Rachel helps Joey look a little more sophisticated with the addition of a trendy shoulder bag - which everyone else mistakes for a women's handbag

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Everybody Finds Out
programme.desc: Chandler and Monica's relationship finally becomes public knowledge to all but Ross, who is starting to get his life back on track by renting a flat opposite the girls. Comedy, starring Courteney Cox and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Girl Who Hits Joey
programme.desc: Ross makes a bad impression on his new neighbours, and Monica piles the pressure on Chandler, demanding more commitment than he feels able to give. Joey's latest girlfriend proves a little too fiery - but he is afraid to end their relationship

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey wonders why he has started dreaming about dating Monica, while Phoebe finds a police badge at Central Perk and decides to take the law into her own hands

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachel's Inadvertent Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel is interviewed for her dream job, but makes the mistake of inadvertently kissing her prospective employer. Meanwhile, Monica competes with Phoebe in the relationship stakes

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel starts taking regular cigarette breaks to ingratiate herself with new boss Kim and colleague Nancy, even though she does not smoke, while Joey competes with Ross's son for a role in a TV commercial. Comedy, guest starring Joanna Gleason (Boogie Nights)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Can't Flirt
programme.desc: Joey tells everyone about his upcoming TV appearance, little anticipating the surprise awaiting him, and Ross flirts with a pizza-delivery woman, but leaves her decidedly unimpressed

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The guys enjoy a ride in a police car, until the sound of a gunshot causes them to fear for their lives. Meanwhile, Rachel accidentally listens to a telephone message to Ross from Emily. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns Gary plans to ask her to move in with him, but fears it is too early in their relationship for such a commitment, and asks Chandler to help her change his mind. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Joey's Big Break
programme.desc: Joey turns up in Las Vegas to start filming his first movie role, only to receive disappointing news. Phoebe racks her brains to remember why she hates Ross so much

programme.sub-title: The One in Vegas - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. The pals visit Las Vegas, where they find surprises galore awaiting them. Meanwhile, Ross misinterprets Rachel's intentions and embarks on a campaign of public humiliation against her - but discovers she is more than a match for him

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One in Vegas - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Rachel makes Ross regret playing a prank on her, while Monica and Chandler have a spot of good luck and Joey tries out his latest get-rich-quick scheme. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston, David Schwimmer and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Rachel wake up the morning after their impromptu marriage and regret the hasty circumstances of the ceremony, while Monica and Chandler find that neither of them really wants to rush to the altar. Joey and Phoebe have a cross-country adventure. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer, Jennifer Aniston, Lisa Kudrow and Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The duo's road trip continues as they arrive in Costa Rica, where Brad's fear of heights is tested as Barney arranges a flight in a tiny, roofless helicopter to take in some of Costa Rica's breathtaking coastal views. Later, the pair meet a quirky animal lover, before heading to the capital city of San Jose, where they join a local Roller Derby team for a match against their biggest rivals

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A man streaks across a golf course, delaying a tournament. Two men climb the Golden Gate Bridge, while an escapee gets caught in a very weird place

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: An innocent woman insists on going to jail with her arrested friend, and a thief runs away with a giant life-size stick figure

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the people who were arrested for allegedly committing some of the weirdest, wildest and most bizarre crimes ever

programme.title: Witness to Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: After a young woman in South Carolina is found dead in her bathtub, the investigation focuses on her estranged husband and her boyfriend

programme.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programme.desc: After a naval reservist is gunned down in her car, detectives scour forensic evidence - but the DNA sample found at the scene creates an unforeseen twist

programme.title: The Real Murders of Orange County
programme.desc: A young mother is killed in her bed in what seems to be a random act of spite, but the true killer is revealed years later to be a twisted manipulator

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A peaceful town is rocked when a beloved young couple are found brutally murdered in their home. As police search for the killer, dark secrets are uncovered

programme.title: Staged: Deadly Deception
programme.desc: Shocking cases where crime scenes were meticulously staged to conceal the truth, leaving investigators to unravel a web of deception. A 999 call reports a baby in distress on a London bus. As panic unfolds, doubts grow over a staged scene, forcing detectives to unravel the truth

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: Officers in suburban Indiana respond to a potential kidnapping, while n rural Colorado, a chilling investigation unfolds on camera

programme.title: Interview with a Killer
programme.desc: Convicted killer Bo Pete Jeffrey claims he remembers nothing about the beating and killing of his wife. David Scott investigates whether it is memory loss or cold-blooded murder

programme.title: Staged: Deadly Deception
programme.desc: Shocking cases where crime scenes were meticulously staged to conceal the truth, leaving investigators to unravel a web of deception. A 999 call reports a baby in distress on a London bus. As panic unfolds, doubts grow over a staged scene, forcing detectives to unravel the truth

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: True crime series exploring fascinating interrogations. Each episode captures the make-or-break moments that occurs within those four walls

programme.title: I Met My Murderer Online
programme.desc: When Tim Kern found a job online, he thought his rough luck was about to change. Little did he know, he was about to meet an untimely death

programme.title: I Met My Murderer Online
programme.desc: Meredith Chapman met Mark Gerardot through an email exchange, before hiring him and having an affair. But when Meredith is found dead, is Mark to blame?

programme.title: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A burned out car and a blood-stained bedroom reveal the murder of a community pillar. Will it be the smallest of clues that lead police to her heartless killer?

programme.title: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Police are tasked with unravelling a mystery after a beloved father and estate agent is ambushed in his office

programme.title: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Should investigators fail to discover the crack in their suspect's seemingly air-tight alibi, a cold-blooded killer will elude justice

programme.title: Killer Britain with Dermot Murnaghan
programme.desc: The veteran journalistot is joined by former Met detective Clive Driscoll to look back at the case of Harry Jarvis, the cheating husband who kept his mistress in the shed while plotting to murder his wife. Detectives faced an uphill battle to prove what happened to mum of four Carol Jarvis

programme.title: Killer Britain with Dermot Murnaghan
programme.desc: Michaela Hall welcomed troubled Lee Kendall into her life. Her kindness cost her everything. A tragic tale of compassion, danger, and fatal trust

programme.title: Cops Gone Bad with Will Mellor
programme.desc: When royal protection officer Michael Coulton's wife is found murdered just yards from her work, a few of his secrets begin to come to light

programme.title: Cops Gone Bad with Will Mellor
programme.desc: An unknown blackmailer laces dog food with poison and baby food with glass, always able to stay one step ahead of police - until his true identity is revealed

programme.title: #Dead2Me
programme.desc: Bennylyn Burke hoped for a better life when she moved from the Philippines to the UK - but she ended up the victim of a cruel predator who would take her life

programme.title: #Dead2Me
programme.desc: Canadian Ashley Wadsworth moved to the UK to be with the long-distance boyfriend she'd met online. Tragically, her family would never see her alive again

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder
programme.desc: The murder of Milton Keynes mum Natalie Hemming, whose body was found three weeks after she went missing in 2016

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder
programme.desc: The tragic story of 11-year-old Wesley Neailey, who was kidnapped and murdered in Newcastle in 1998

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: The murders of 16 people in Hungerford, west Berkshire, in August 1987, when unemployed labourer and antiques dealer Michael Ryan went on a shooting spree. The community went into virtual lockdown as emergency teams and journalists flocked to the town. The gunman eventually barricaded himself in a classroom and committed suicide later the same day

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: The brother of Christopher Foster speaks about his shock when he realised that his sibling had murdered his wife and daughter in Shropshire in 2008

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: Dark Family Secrets Unearthed in the Bible Belt
programme.desc: Two siblings hear unsettling stories about their family's history, and people who went missing in 1992

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: The Vanishing of a Promising Wisconsin Teen
programme.desc: In 1990, an 18-year-old driving across Wisconsin to a job conference never arrives. After her van and later her body are discovered, the mystery persists for more than two decades

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: The Grisly Discovery on the Gulf Coast
programme.desc: When body parts wash ashore in the Gulf Coast over several days in 2012, investigators must identify the victim before they can find the killers. Even then, justice is elusive

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: The Massacre that Ravaged a Sleepy Suburb
programme.desc: Six people are slain in a home in a quiet Iowa town, with one survivor claiming to have no memory of the incident. The eventual trial shreds a neighbourhood's social fabric

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: In 1977, people across Pittsburgh live in fear as a killer invades homes and senselessly attacks with a shotgun, knives and hammers in the dead of night

programme.desc: The disappeance of mother of three in 1999, and how the investigation went nowhere until her sister launched a social media campaign a decade later

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, critiquing The Outlaws, Family Fortunes, You, Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House and The Mating Game. They also offer their thoughts on ITV News of COP26 and other stories. Narrated by Craig Cash. From November 2021

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Reiki healer and animal communicator Jayne is set up on a date with 44-year-old children's entertainer Stuart. Meanwhile, headstrong parliamentary researcher Cecilia, who's 23, is looking for a man to match her drive and determination, and may have met her match when she meets straight-talking business development manager Viv. Student James, who has a prosthetic leg and has had his confidence knocked from dates in the past, is set up on a date with fellow student Emilie, who is making the brave move into the world of dating

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. This time, 22-year-old transgender woman Amira, and Andy, a rugby player from Coventry, take part

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray coaches Barry for his first high school wrestling match but keeps it a secret from Beverly, who is sure to disapprove of her son taking part in such a dangerous sport. Adam blackmails Erica into waiting in line with him to buy tickets for the new Stars Wars movie

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray gets his moment in the spotlight when he is honoured by his old high school for his basketball prowess. While he and Beverly are away from home, Barry takes advantage of their absence to throw a party to impress his school friends

programme.desc: More couples from some of the programme's most dramatic weddings look back on their big days. Rachel and Adam look back on their 1980s Aussie soap wedding, when Adam attempted to recreate the magical moment Jason Donovan married Kylie Minogue in Neighbours

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: The five remaining teams are each given a base plate representing a typical room in a house - from a kitchen to a bathroom and a bedroom - and have 10 hours to create minifigures living in the land of the giants. The holders of the Big Brick assign the rooms to the teams

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Dee Dee struggles to hide her emotions as the village gathers for Diane's funeral, Beth continues to seek justice, and a resident's trauma catches up with them. A teenager's grief leads them down a dangerous path, Warren has a surprise for Mercedes, and Beth sets in motion a plan that sends shockwaves through feuding families. Also, Mercedes has a life-altering decision to make

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It is Decision Day in Austin, and the final reckoning for the newlyweds. The stakes have never been higher as the couples face the ultimate decision - do they stay married or walk away for good?

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It has been 18 months since a shocking Decision Day left everyone speechless. The brides and grooms reunite and reflect on their MAFS experience

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes it his mission to find a devastated Smithers a boyfriend and signs him up to a dating app. Lisa gets a leading role in the school production of Casablanca, leaving Milhouse jealous of her co-star and Bart plotting sabotage. Guest starring George Takei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa on a theatre trip to the big city to make up for a rough patch in their relationship. Bart is frustrated that everyone seems to be well prepared for his pranks in advance, so he teams up with Maggie to play practical jokes on unsuspecting victims

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer and Marge are lost in an icy wilderness, they must push themselves to their limits to survive

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Queens, New York, where he meets a family torn apart by the stress of running failing Greek restaurant Kati Allo. Husband-and-wife owners Manny and Christine are on the brink of divorce, while their daughter Evelyn is caught in the middle and at her wits' end

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Woodland Park, Colorado, where guests have a choice between casual fine-dining service or a pick-up from the drive-through takeaway. Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. In order to save the struggling Italian restaurant from disaster, he must persuade harassed owner Julie to co-operate with the head chef, and work his magic on a menu that relies heavily on a microwave

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart, Martin and the bullies have to run for their lives when a weekend in the wilderness takes a dark turn

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: You Won't Believe What This Ep's About: Act 3 Will Shock You!
programme.desc: All of Springfield is outraged when Homer is accused of leaving Santa's Little Helper locked in a hot car

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer leads a rebellion of loser dads against the friendship between Bart and a child who is famous influencer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Cletus discovers that his wife Brandine has been hiding a secret love of learning

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Simon Cowell provides the voice of the sharp-tongued administrator of a nursery for gifted children who has the job of deciding whether to accept Maggie. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Ziff Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly takes the blame for his former love rival Artie Ziff's shady financial dealings and business irregularities. Arrested and put on trial, he is shocked to find himself sentenced to 10 years in prison. With the guest voice of Jon Lovitz

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: Cal Wilson and Natalie Tran host as contestants don their aprons and hit the shed in a bid to be crowned Australia's best amateur baker. The judges are Rachel Khoo and Darren Purchese. Twelve keen bakers take on three cake-based challenges - a signature pull-apart cake made up of individually designed cupcakes, a technical passionfruit chiffon cake, and a birthday cake showstopper

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol (2011)

The spies plan to clear their name by abducting the real terrorist, which leads them into a pursuit around the globe. However, Hunt cannot be sure his colleagues are trustworthy. Action adventure sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Simon Pegg and Paula Patton

She is followed by 28-year-old veterinary student Kurt, a real-life Dr Doolittle who can talk to the animals but gets tongue-tied speaking to women. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Stockport serve up an inventive menu, a fresh, healthy series of dishes and a taste of Asia as they compete for the cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bromley, south-east London, Jo and her discerning foodie partner Alex kick off proceedings with a fine dining menu but the guests are not impressed. Day two sees Ryan and Julie go back to their roots cooking up an Americana menu, but the food fails to wow with Michelle comparing the main course to vomit. Finally it's the turn of Michelle and confident Craig, who give their guests a taste of the Caribbean

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: South Londoner James is given £12,000 and a maximum of three weeks to plan every detail of his nuptials, but future mother-in-law Janey lends a helping hand, determined to give her daughter Daisy a cockney knees-up. The laid-back groom-to-be wants a more romantic day, but has to decide whether 'mother knows best' as he sets out to give his bride the wedding she deserves

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: More baffled brides get their own back on their hapless grooms in this festive episode, with Kayleigh, Fern, Lauren, Jackie and Kara looking back on their special days

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: Don't Tell the Bride to Be: The Proposals
programme.desc: Documentary following men and women as they propose to their partners in bold and romantic ways. programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Ben, a 30-year-old from Wales, hopes the £12,000 he has at his disposal will provide his controlling fiancee Sarah with the wedding of her dreams. However, her desire to get married abroad and his mother's reluctance to trust his decisions threaten his chances of success

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A man from Blackpool is given £12,000 to organise every detail of his nuptials. However, while Mike's bride Katie dreams of a ceremony fit for a Hollywood superstar, the groom refuses to use a mobile phone or the internet in his planning, and hopes to rely on local attractions to pull off this ideal wedding

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Former participants Amit Kleinberger, Randy DeWitt and Steve Greenbaum want to take another look at the everyday workings of their businesses, but fear they will be recognised. They each send an employee in their place to report on how their firms are functioning

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jeff Platt, the president and CEO of entertainment and fitness business Sky Zone, poses as a contestant on a reality TV show who is trying to win an action-adventure holiday. He aims to discover whether his fast-growing company is running as smoothly and efficiently as possible, but his secret identity is jeopardised when he encounters a colleague he has met on a previous occasion

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Harpers Ferry in West Virginia, where he tries to save the Town's Inn, a historic hotel run by retired teacher and junk hoarder Karan Townsend. She has accumulated so many useless belongings that there is hardly any room to accommodate guests. Can Gordon convince her to get rid of her clutter or will the hotel continue to go down the pan?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues his battle to restore the failing Town's Inn in Harpers Ferry, West Virginia. After witnessing abysmal food hygiene practices in the restaurant, the chef is left in disbelief as he uncovers terrifying cleanliness issues throughout the hotel. Can he win over stubborn owner Karan Townsend and persuade her to turn things round?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks into the luxurious Lakeview Hotel on Lake Chelan, Washington, where the bedrooms are empty and the hotel's restaurant and ice-cream parlour are failing. Gordon confronts owner Brent's inappropriate and miserly behaviour, but is it enough to repair the establishment's reputation?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Brick Hotel in Newtown, Pennsylvania, where the staff have had enough of owner Verindar, who runs the establishment like an angry tyrant. Can Gordon convince her to value her loyal workers and entice customers back to this landmark hotel?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the Beachfront Inn and Inlet, a Caribbean-style resort hotel in Fort Pierce, Florida. Young and inexperienced owner Brian is making guests' time at the hotel miserable with dusty rooms, late-night concerts and poor service. Can Gordon prevent the business from going under?

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan Bones from Essex is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials and give his fiancee Nikki Bacon her perfect wedding. programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Adam is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials, and hopes to make up for past mistakes by giving his fiancee Lydia the wedding of her dreams. However, his history of reckless spending and determination to plan a lavish party do not bode well for the bride, who has her heart set on a church ceremony just like her mother's

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A tattoo artist is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials, and hopes to incorporate his love of heavy metal into the day. However, his obsessively organised bride expects nothing less than the fairy-tale wedding of her dreams, complete with castles, sparkles and magical unicorns

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Chicago-based hardware retailer True Value's CEO and president John Hartmann poses as a handyman taking part in a reality show to go incognito among his own workforce to see how he can extend the company's lifespan and improve the experiences of both customers and employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bill Peduto, 60th Mayor of Pittsburgh, who comes from a proud family of Pennsylvania steel workers, goes incognito among his own workforce posing as a reality show contestant from Kentucky. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples host dinner parties in Essex, with an eye on the £1,000 prize. The first couple to host are flight attendant Penny and doctors' surgery manager Chris. Their homely menu doesn't quite live up to the standards of bling-loving receptionist Tatia and her husband, metal worker Mick. The youngest duo, Lewis and Krystal, host on day two and manage to impress their older guests. Finally, it's Mick and Tatia's chance to show off their culinary skills with a fancy menu

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Jade and Stuart kick off the competition in Essex with a fun and spontaneous menu. On day two, Mark and Diane bring a taste of their Mediterranean travels to their menu, by way of their garden, and encourage their guests to sing with them. Finally it's the turn of image-conscious Chris and Rosella to wow their guests with Rosella's nana's Italian recipe. Brewing tension from the week finally comes to a head, before the winner is revealed

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from the north east of England compete - loved-up musicians Nick and Kelly, laidback Michael and Becky, and Matthew and Katie with their refined French cuisine

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Loudonville, Ohio, to rescue Landoll's Mohican Castle, a custom-built, multimillion-dollar hotel set in an 1100-acre woodland estate. Co-owner Marta is struggling, having been left with the entire burden of running such a large establishment alone. Can Gordon persuade her son Jimmy to finally take the reins and turn this business around before the family legacy is destroyed?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels across the United States in search of restaurants in dire need of renovation - and after analysing their situation, he has just 24 hours to bring them back from the brink of disaster. His first stop is the New York community of Congers, where he hopes to save family-run Italian restaurant Bella Gianna's. Gordon and his team work round the clock to clean the premises, remodel the interior and revamp the menu, while also teaching the staff to prepare new dishes and work together as an efficient unit. What will the customers think of the new-look restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is given just 24 hours to improve troubled American restaurants, continuing with in New Orleans with the Old Coffee Pot, a century-old bistro that used to be one of the best breakfast spots in the area. Gordon and his team brighten up the kitchen and dining area and introduce new dishes. But what will the staff think of the changes?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon travels to the heart of Los Angeles, California, to save the Brownstone Bistro, a Caribbean fusion restaurant. The chef and his team have just 24 hours to renovate the premises with a vibrant look, create more space in the cramped kitchen and introduce a simplified menu featuring fresh and authentic Caribbean fare, working around the clock to teach the staff how to cook the dishes

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon travels to Greenville, Mississippi, to save fine dining establishment Sherman's Restaurant, which has been a presence in the town for 30 years. The chef and his team have just 24 hours to revamp the premises, clean and renovate the kitchen and introduce a new menu featuring update versions of the restaurant's staple dishes, working around the clock to teach the staff how to prepare them

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. programme.desc: Lisa tries to persuade her family not to take part in the town's annual snake-clubbing ritual, but her words fall on deaf ears as Homer anticipates the event with glee. With the guest voice of Barry White

programme.title: Moonfall (2022)
programme.desc: A mysterious force knocks the Moon from its orbit and sends the Earth's only natural satellite on a collision course with our planet. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Ziff Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly takes the blame for his former love rival Artie Ziff's shady financial dealings and business irregularities. Arrested and put on trial, he is shocked to find himself sentenced to 10 years in prison. With the guest voice of Jon Lovitz

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: Cal Wilson and Natalie Tran host as contestants don their aprons and hit the shed in a bid to be crowned Australia's best amateur baker. The judges are Rachel Khoo and Darren Purchese. Twelve keen bakers take on three cake-based challenges - a signature pull-apart cake made up of individually designed cupcakes, a technical passionfruit chiffon cake, and a birthday cake showstopper

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol (2011)
programme.desc: Secret agent Ethan Hunt and his team are implicated in a bombing at the Kremlin, forcing the American president to declare them fugitives. The spies plan to clear their name by abducting the real terrorist, which leads them into a pursuit around the globe. However, Hunt cannot be sure his colleagues are trustworthy. Action adventure sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Simon Pegg and Paula Patton

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. First up is 27-year-old flight attendant Alex from Bristol. Having never had a serious relationship, he is hoping to land himself a man for the long haul. He is followed by 26-year-old Laura from Gloucestershire, a horse-loving country girl who is looking for love
